features: 1 x Air wick Cosy Cottage Frosted Roses & Snowberry Room Freshener - 42ml
🌴 NATURAL RATTAN STEMS: Air Wick Reed Diffusers use natural ratta
🤗 Create a warm welcoming atmosphere in your home whether it's in your living room or bedroom with its nature-inspired fragrance and elegant design

🌹 Surround yourself in the inviting scent of sweet winter rose as you sit cosily in your cottage drinking a warm drink by the fire, through the window you see twinkling lights and softly falling snow as you indulge in this magical moment
Give your home that festive feeling with Air Wick’s seasonal fragrances. Enjoy our Festive Scents as you put up your Christmas Decorations and cosy up to watch your favourite Christmas movies
description: Product Description Air Wick Reed Diffusers use natural rattan stems to delicately diffuse wonderful long lasting fragrances and improve your home fragrance for up to 5 weeks. Create a welcoming atmosphere in your home whether it's in your living room or bedroom with its nature-inspired fragrance and elegant design. Air Freshener. Ingredients Contains: Dipropylene glycolmonomethyl ether, PHENETHYL ALCOHOL, LINALOOL, COUMARIN, EUGENOLD_LIMONENE.
